source.note: FULL/verifiable multi-app port; deterministic container grade

task.en: The Jamaica trip is off — cancel it across four seeded apps open in Safari: Dinoco Airlines http://localhost:3011, HooliCalendar http://localhost:3017, HooliChat http://localhost:3004, Cheskepdia http://localhost:3012. (1) In Dinoco, cancel flight DN1562 (AVP to Montego Bay). (2) In HooliCalendar, cancel the 'Sandals Montego Bay' Jamaica trip events. (3) In HooliChat, send Jim Halpert a direct message telling him the trip is cancelled (use the word 'cancelled'). (4) In Cheskepdia, open the Sandals Montego Bay booking and send the host a message requesting cancellation.
